creator: Andrew Clay Shafer

evidence.text: Andrew Clay Shafer is regarded as a contributor to whatever 'devops' is and helping spread the body of knowledge now known by this name. As cofounder of Puppet Labs, Andrew help transformed the way people manage IT infrastructure. He popularized the concept of "infrastructure as code", and helps to improve IT with both tools and culture. Andrew is most happy when he is learning or teaching.
